Work to Review: 9/20/2024

Ryan Taylor

9/20/2024

To Do

  • Process data
    • Summarize the number of images per patient
    • Summarize time between images
    • Summarize multiple fusions
    • Filter to the last picture for each patient
    • Exclude multiple fusions
    • Exclude lambdoid fusions
  • Run multivariate regression
    • Plot \(\beta\)’s for each fusion on brain map
    • Plot residuals by region
    • Check residuals against age
  • Read papers to understand data preprocessing
    • What is being subtracted from what?
    • Why is PCA used to determine scores, and not pre-specified anatomical regions?
    • When in the process are volumes / areas projected?

Summary

  • There are relatively few repeated pictures in the dataset

  • Very few patients have multiple sutures (other than bicoronal)

  • Distributions of volume distributions look relatively normal for each patient, although they are always right-skewed

  • Coefficients look similar across different types of sutures except for Sagittal

  • Covariance matrices of coefficients also look relatively similar across regions

  • I have not compared the residuals to each other by region or compared these residuals to age

  • I have not read through the papers to understand their preprocessing steps

Work

here::i_am("analysis/2024.09.20 Meeting Doc.Rmd")

# File saved in "data" folder one level above repo
cranio_raw <- read_xlsx(here::here("../data/VolumetricResults-8-6-2024.xlsx"))



cranio <- cranio_raw %>% clean_names() 

sut <- cranio %>% select(matches("fused")) %>% 
  mutate(i = 1:n()) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = -i) %>%
  mutate(suture = if_else(value == 1, name, NA_character_)) %>% 
  group_by(i) %>% 
  summarize(sutures = paste(na.omit(suture), collapse = "/")) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  arrange(i)

cranio %<>% 
  bind_cols(sut %>% select(sutures)) %>% 
  mutate(num_sutures = rowSums(select(., matches("fused"))),
         suture_type = case_when(num_sutures = 2 & 
                                   left_coronal_fused == 1 & 
                                   right_coronal_fused == 1 ~ "bicoronal",
                                 num_sutures > 1 ~ "multiple",
                                 num_sutures == 0 ~ "no_suture",
                                 T ~ sutures)) %>% 
  mutate(suture_type = str_remove_all(suture_type, "_fused"))

Data Summary

# Summarize counts
cran_summ <- cranio %>% 
  summarize(rows = n(),
            pics = n_distinct(image_identifier),
            patients = n_distinct(uid))

kable(cran_summ, caption = "All pictures and patients")
All pictures and patients
rows pics patients
2626 2626 2464 
# Multiple pictures
multi_pic <- cranio %>% 
  arrange(uid, age_at_image_days) %>% 
  group_by(uid, suture_type) %>% 
  mutate(days_diff = age_at_image_days - lag(age_at_image_days, 1)) %>% 
  summarize(pics = n(),
            avg_day_diff = mean(days_diff, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  group_by(pics, suture_type) %>% 
  summarize(patients = n_distinct(uid),
            avg_days_between = weighted.mean(avg_day_diff, pics)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  arrange(desc(pics))

kable(multi_pic, caption = "Repeat Visits")

# Suture types
sut_type <- cranio %>% 
  group_by(suture_type) %>% 
  summarize(pics = n(),
            patients = n_distinct(uid)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  arrange(desc(pics)) %>% 
  mutate(pats_included = if_else(suture_type %in% c("multiple", "right_lambdoid", "left_lambdoid"), 0, patients)) %>% 
  adorn_totals("row")

kable(sut_type, caption = "Suture Representation")

# Multiple sutures

multi_sut <- cranio %>% 
  filter(suture_type == "multiple") %>% 
  group_by(sutures) %>% 
  summarize(pics = n(),
            patients = n_distinct(uid)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  arrange(desc(pics))

kable(multi_sut, caption = "Multiple Sutures (Exc.) Bicoronal")

# Changes within patient
patient <- cranio %>% 
  arrange(uid, age_at_image_days) %>% 
  group_by(uid) %>% 
  summarize(pics = n(),
            suture_prog = paste(na.omit(unique(suture_type)))) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  group_by(suture_prog) %>% 
  summarize(pics = sum(pics),
            patients = n()) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  arrange(desc(pics))

kable(patient, caption = "Patient Progressions: No Changes in Diagnosis")
Patient Progressions: No Changes in Diagnosis

bicoronal 93 83
right_coronal 65 53
left_coronal 37 36
multiple 35 28
left_lambdoid 10 6
right_lambdoid 7 3 
# Volumes
vols <- cranio %>% 
  summarize(across(matches("region"),
                   .fns = list("num_na" = ~sum(is.na(.)),
                               "mean" = ~mean(., na.rm = T),
                               "med" = ~quantile(., 0.5, na.rm = T),
                               "min" = ~min(., na.rm = T),
                               "pct25" = ~quantile(., 0.25, na.rm = T),
                               "pct75" = ~quantile(., 0.75, na.rm = T),
                               "max" = ~max(., na.rm = T)))) %>% 
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_pattern = "(region_[0-9]+_volume_difference_m_l)_(.*)",
               names_to = c("col", ".value"))

kable(vols, caption = "Volume Distributions")

vol_dists <- cranio %>% 
  select(matches("region")) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = everything()) %>% 
  mutate(region_num = str_extract(name, "[0-9]+") %>% as.numeric() %>% as.factor()) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=region_num, y=value, fill=region_num)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(width=0.2) +
  labs(title = "Volume Difference Distributions")

vol_dists

Multivariate Regression

# Filter to regression subset
cranio_reg <- cranio %>% 
  # Exclude rare sutures
  filter(!suture_type %in% c("multiple", "left_lambdoid", "right_lambdoid")) %>% 
  # Filter to one picture per patient
  arrange(uid, age_at_image_days) %>% 
  group_by(uid) %>% 
  slice_tail(n=1) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(suture_type = factor(suture_type))

# Create model matrices
Y <- cranio_reg %>% 
  select(matches("region")) %>% 
  as.matrix()

X <- cranio_reg$suture_type %>% 
  factor() %>% 
  Dummy(base = "no_suture")

# Run regression
vol_reg <- lm(Y ~ X)
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("../Literature/Region_Diagram.png"))

# Manually define center points of regions
brain_points <- tribble(
  ~region, ~x, ~y,
  1, 1, 5,
  2, 2, 6, 
  3, 3, 6,
  4, 4, 5,
  5, 4, 4,
  6, 3, 3, 
  7, 4, 2,
  8, 3, 1,
  9, 2, 1,
  10, 1, 2,
  11, 2, 3,
  12, 1, 4
) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), remove = F)

# Create shapes around these points
g = st_combine(st_geometry(brain_points)) # make multipoint
v = st_voronoi(g)
v = st_collection_extract(v)

# Add region numbers
brain_shapes <- v[unlist(st_intersects(brain_points, v))] %>% 
  st_as_sf() %>% 
  mutate(region_num = 1:n())

# Extract and clean coefficients
reg_coeffs <- coefficients(vol_reg) %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column() %>% 
  pivot_longer(-rowname) %>% 
  mutate(region_num = str_extract(name, "[0-9]+") %>% as.numeric(),
         suture_clean = str_sub(rowname, 2, -1) %>% 
           str_replace_all("_", " ") %>% 
           str_remove_all("\\(|\\)") %>% 
           str_to_title()) %>% 
  left_join(brain_shapes) %>% 
  st_as_sf()

# Plot coefficients
coeff_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = reg_coeffs, aes(fill = value)) +
  facet_wrap(~suture_clean) +
  scale_fill_gradient2()

coeff_plot

# Plot residuals
resid_df <- vol_reg$residuals %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column() %>% 
  pivot_longer(-rowname) %>% 
  mutate(region_num = str_extract(name, "[0-9]+") %>% as.numeric() %>% as.factor())

resid_plot <- ggplot(resid_df) +
  geom_violin(aes(x = region_num, y = value, fill = region_num)) +
  labs(title = "Residuals by Region")

resid_plot

vol_dists

# Plot covariances
cov_mx <- vcov(vol_reg) %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  rownames_to_column() %>% 
  pivot_longer(-rowname, names_to = "colname") %>% 
  mutate(region_num_1 = str_extract(rowname, "[0-9]+") %>% 
           as.numeric() %>% as.factor(),
         region_num_2 = str_extract(colname, "[0-9]+") %>% 
           as.numeric() %>% as.factor(),
         variable_1 = str_match(rowname, "\\:(.*)")[,2] %>% 
           str_sub(2, -1) %>% 
           str_replace_all("_", " ") %>% 
           str_remove_all("\\(|\\)") %>% 
           str_to_title(),
         variable_2 = str_match(colname, "\\:(.*)")[,2] %>%  
           str_sub(2, -1) %>% 
           str_replace_all("_", " ") %>% 
           str_remove_all("\\(|\\)") %>% 
           str_to_title()
         )

cov_mx_suture <- cov_mx %>% 
  filter(variable_1 == variable_2 &
           variable_1 != "Intercept")

cov_plot_suture <- ggplot(cov_mx_suture) +
  geom_tile(aes(x = region_num_1, y = region_num_2, fill = value)) +
  facet_wrap(~variable_1) +
  scale_fill_gradient2() +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev)

cov_plot_suture

Questions
